caption: A man with a tall, spiked grey wig and glasses is seated in a studio, wearing a white collared shirt, a bow tie, and suspenders. He wears black headphones and speaks into a professional microphone positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall filled with framed photographs and various pieces of equipment, including a white bag hanging on a rack. On-screen text and logos appear in the lower portions of the frames, including "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST." Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, though his facial expression and mouth movements shift as he speaks, and he slightly tilts his head. The lighting and background remain static throughout the clip.
